title: selaginella delicatissima
intro: Selaginella delicatissima, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to help alleviate various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella delicatissima include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Selaginella delicatissima is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
